headline: How Amphenol’s New Euro Debt And AI Data Center Push At APH Has Changed Its Investment Story
summary: Amphenol Corporation recently priced a €500 million senior notes offering due 2031 via its German subsidiary at a 3.625% annual interest rate, with proceeds earmarked to repay Euro notes maturing in 2026 and for general corporate purposes. At the same time, Amphenol’s IT datacom segment has been reinforced by its position as a primary connector supplier to Nvidia and the integration of CommScope’s CCS assets, deepening its reach into AI-focused data centers and other connectivity end...
